sections.title: Critical Anti-Pattern: Tests That Always Pass
sections.content:
The most pervasive issue is `expect(x || true).toBeTruthy()` appearing in ~15 test files. Every assertion written this way is a no-op — it passes regardless of application state. Examples:

```typescript
// test_document_chain.spec.ts:67
expect(hasDocumentType || true).toBeTruthy();   // always true

// test_estate_planning.spec.ts:101
expect(hasAssetContent || true).toBeTruthy();   // always true

// test_offline_mode.spec.ts:107
expect(isStillVisible || true).toBeTruthy();    // always true
```

These tests provide zero signal. Every file with this pattern is a coverage lie.

---

sections.title: Gap 1: Authentication Edge Cases
Gap 2: Document CRUD Lifecycle (No Create/Edit/Delete Tests)
Gap 3: API Error State Handling (German Error Messages)
Gap 4: Form Validation (Missing Entirely)
Gap 5: GDPR / Data Privacy Tests (Security Requirement)
Gap 6: Multi-Tenancy / Role-Based Access (Security Critical)
Gap 7: Skonto / Invoice Payment Workflow (Business Logic)
Gap 8: Accessibility Assertions Are Declared But Never Asserted
Summary of Gaps
sections.content:
| Category | Files Missing | Severity |
|---|---|---|
| Always-passing assertions (`\|\| true`) | 15 spec files | **Critical** — tests are noise |
| Auth edge cases (lockout, token expiry, 2FA) | `test_auth_edge_cases.spec.ts` | **High** |
| Document CRUD lifecycle | `test_document_crud.spec.ts` | **High** |
| German API error messages | `test_api_error_states.spec.ts` | **High** — violates CLAUDE.md Rule 2 |
| Form validation (German copy) | `test_form_validation.spec.ts` | **High** |
| GDPR/data privacy | `test_gdpr.spec.ts` | **High** — compliance requirement |
| RBAC / multi-tenancy | `test_access_control.spec.ts` | **High** — security requirement |
| Skonto business logic | `test_skonto_workflow.spec.ts` | **Medium** |
| Accessibility assertions never read | All specs calling `checkBasicAccessibility` | **Medium** |
| DATEV/Lexware import E2E | missing entirely | **Medium** |
| OCR backend selection | missing entirely | **Medium** |
| API state teardown / test isolation | all specs | **Medium** — tests share global state |

The single highest-ROI fix is removing `|| true` from all assertions. Every such assertion must be replaced with either a real assertion or `test.skip()` with a comment explaining why the feature isn't reliably testable.
